description_long: This is a small wooden cabin with a gable roof covered in gray shingles, featuring a front porch supported by two posts. The front facade has a centered door flanked by two green-trimmed windows, and the porch is furnished with two black metal chairs. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving the structure a rustic appearance. The side and rear walls are solid with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing privacy and simplicity. The porch floor is made of wooden planks, matching the overall material palette of the cabin. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, providing some shelter to the porch area.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable shingle roof, front porch, and two green-trimmed windows flanking a central door. The porch features two black chairs and the exterior is clad in horizontal wood planks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gable roof, centered door, two green-trimmed windows, and a wooden porch with two black chairs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, windowless wooden wall and a partial view of the porch interior.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain wooden wall with no windows or doors, and the continuation of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a long, windowless wooden wall and a glimpse of the porch interior from the other side.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with gray asphalt shingles and moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized, rectangular windows symmetrically flanking the front door; no windows visible on the sides or rear
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, directly accessible from the porch
